formulas.formula: Trade revenue + Related party revenue = Total revenue
components: Sales and other operating revenues - Trade
Sales and other operating revenues - Related parties
formulas.operation: Sales and other operating revenues - Trade + Sales and other operating revenues - Related parties

formulas.formula: Cost of sales + Impairments + SGA + RD = Total operating costs
formulas.operation: Cost of sales + Impairments + Selling, general and administrative expenses + Research and development expenses

formulas.formula: Revenue - Total operating costs = Operating income
formulas.operation: Sales and other operating revenues - Total operating costs and expenses

formulas.formula: Operating income - Interest expense + Interest income + Other income = Income before equity and taxes
components: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes
formulas.operation: Operating income - Interest expense + Interest income + Other income, net
formulas.result_label: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes

formulas.formula: Income before equity and taxes + Equity investments = Income before taxes
components: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes
Income from continuing operations before income taxes
formulas.operation: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes + (Loss) income from equity investments
formulas.result_label: Income from continuing operations before income taxes

formulas.formula: Income before taxes - Provision for taxes = Income from continuing operations
components: Income from continuing operations before income taxes
formulas.operation: Income from continuing operations before income taxes - Provision for income taxes

formulas.formula: Income from continuing operations + Loss from discontinued = Net income
components: Loss from discontinued operations, net of tax
formulas.operation: Income from continuing operations + Loss from discontinued operations, net of tax

formulas.formula: Net income - Dividends on redeemable NCI = Net income attributable to Company shareholders
components: Net income attributable to the Company shareholders
formulas.operation: Net income - Dividends on redeemable non-controlling interests
formulas.result_label: Net income attributable to the Company shareholders

formulas.formula: Cash + Restricted cash + AR Trade + AR Related + Inventories + Prepaid = Total current assets
components: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents + Restricted cash + Accounts receivable - Trade, net + Accounts receivable - Related parties + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets

formulas.formula: PP&E gross - Accumulated depreciation = PP&E net
formulas.operation: Property, plant and equipment - Less: Accumulated depreciation

formulas.formula: Current maturities + Short-term debt + AP Trade + AP Related + Accrued liabilities = Total current liabilities
formulas.operation: Current maturities of long-term debt + Short-term debt + Accounts payable - Trade + Accounts payable - Related parties + Accrued and other current liabilities

formulas.formula: Company share + Non-controlling interests = Total equity
components: Total Company share of shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Total Company share of shareholders equity + Non-controlling interests

formulas.formula: Ordinary shares + APIC + Retained earnings + AOCI + Treasury stock = Total Company share of equity
components: Total Company share of shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Ordinary shares + Additional paid-in capital + Retained earnings + Accumulated other comprehensive loss + Treasury stock
formulas.result_label: Total Company share of shareholders equity

formulas.formula: Total assets = Total liabilities + Redeemable NCI + Total equity
components: Total liabilities, redeemable non-controlling interests and equity
formulas.operation: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Operating lease liabilities + Other liabilities + Deferred income taxes + Redeemable non-controlling interests + Total equity
formulas.result_label: Total liabilities, redeemable non-controlling interests and equity

components: Expenditures for property, plant and equipment

components: Net cash used in financing activities

cross_statement_checks.check: Retained earnings change on BS = Net income - Common dividends - Redeemable NCI dividends + SBC charge to retained earnings
cross_statement_checks.detail: Retained earnings went from 9692 to 9752 (change = +60). Net income = 473, Common dividends = -408, Redeemable NCI dividends charged to retained = -2, SBC charge to retained earnings = -3. Net = 473 - 408 - 2 - 3 = 60. This matches the BS change of 60.

operating_leases.current_location: Current portion of operating lease liabilities is not separately disclosed on the balance sheet face. The XBRL fact OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrentStatementOfFinancialPositionExtensibleList is not provided. Based on the assets held for sale note, $17M of operating lease liabilities for the EO&D disposal group are classified within Accrued and other current liabilities. The current portion of continuing operations operating leases is embedded within Accrued and other current liabilities (us-gaap:AccruedLiabilitiesCurrent = 1944). No total OperatingLeaseLiability XBRL fact provided; only noncurrent = 1380.
operating_leases.flag: Current operating lease liability not separately broken out on balance sheet face; likely embedded in Accrued and other current liabilities

depreciation_and_amortization.note: The primary D&A line on the CF statement is us-gaap:DepreciationDepletionAndAmortization = 365 for Q1 2024. Amortization of debt-related costs (us-gaap:AmortizationOfFinancingCostsAndDiscounts = 2) is separately listed. Total D&A per segment reconciliation = 365.

accounts_payable.combined_with: Trade AP (3486) + Related party AP (486) both tagged as us-gaap:AccountsPayableTradeCurrent
accounts_payable.detail: Trade AP (non-related party context c-12) = 3486. Related party AP (context c-14) = 486. Pure trade AP excluding related parties = 3486. The disposal group note shows 23M of AP-Trade held for sale embedded within Prepaid/Accrued on BS.

accounts_receivable.detail: Trade AR net (non-related party, c-12) = 4001. Related party AR (c-14) = 190. Pure trade AR = 4001. Note 5 discloses allowance for credit losses of 6M as of March 31 2024. Note that 41M of AR-Trade in disposal group is reported within Prepaid expenses and other current assets on BS.

capex.detail: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquirePropertyPlantAndEquipment = 483 for Q1 2024. No supplemental disclosure of capital expenditures incurred but not yet paid found. The segment table also shows total capex = 483 matching CF statement.

acquisitions.note: No cash acquisitions in Q1 2024. The NATPET acquisition (35% interest for approximately 500M) was announced in January 2024 but expected to close in coming months; no cash paid in Q1 2024.

short_term_debt.detail: Short-term debt on BS = 164M consisting entirely of precious metal financings. Commercial paper = 0, U.S. Receivables Facility = 0 per note disclosures. Current maturities of LT debt = 7M (separate BS line). The EO&D disposal group also has 43M of short-term debt classified within Accrued and other current liabilities per Note 3.

sbc.detail: us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensation = 34 for Q1 2024 per CF statement. No breakdown by function disclosed in the 10-Q notes.

interest_expense.source: Gross interest expense us-gaap:InterestExpense = 127 from IS and CF reconciliation. Interest income us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest = 41 from IS. Net interest expense = 86 per MD&A EBITDA reconciliation table. The 127 is the gross figure per the IS; the derivative note shows some interest rate hedge impacts recognized in interest expense (fair value hedge: 23M gain; cash flow hedge reclassification: 1M).

tax_rate.detail: IncomeTaxExpenseBenefit = 122, IncomeLossFromContinuingOperationsBeforeIncomeTaxesExtraordinaryItemsNoncontrollingInterest = 596. Effective rate = 122/596 = 20.47%. Company disclosed effective rate of 20.4% consistent with XBRL fact us-gaap:EffectiveIncomeTaxRateContinuingOperations = 0.204. Pretax income is positive, no fallback needed.

inventory.detail: From Note 6 inventory table: Finished goods = 3112, Work-in-process = 202, Raw materials and supplies = 1539, Total = 4853. All values as of March 31 2024. Note: 73M of inventories in disposal group are embedded within Prepaid expenses and other current assets on the BS.

corrected_components.label: Distributions of earnings, net of tax
Expenditures for property, plant and equipment

formula_checks.formula: Trade revenue + Related party revenue = Total revenue
Cost of sales + Impairments + SGA + RD = Total operating costs
Revenue - Total operating costs = Operating income
Operating income - Interest expense + Interest income + Other income = Income before equity and taxes
Income before equity and taxes + Equity investments = Income before taxes
Income before taxes - Provision for taxes = Income from continuing operations
Income from continuing operations + Loss from discontinued = Net income
Net income - Dividends on redeemable NCI = Net income attributable to Company shareholders
Cash + Restricted cash + AR Trade + AR Related + Inventories + Prepaid = Total current assets
PP&E gross - Accumulated depreciation = PP&E net
Current maturities + Short-term debt + AP Trade + AP Related + Accrued liabilities = Total current liabilities
Company share + Non-controlling interests = Total equity
Ordinary shares + APIC + Retained earnings + AOCI + Treasury stock = Total Company share of equity
Total assets = Total liabilities + Redeemable NCI + Total equity
Net income + D&A + Impairments + Debt amortization + SBC + Equity loss + Distributions + Deferred tax + AR change + Inventory change + AP change + Other = Net CFO
Share repurchases + Dividends + LT debt issuance + Debt issuance costs + LT debt repayment + Other = Net CFF
CFO + CFI + CFF + FX = Net change in cash
Beginning cash + Net change = Ending cash
